title: 1st International Neurophilosophy Symposium
content:
1st International Neurophilosophy Symposium

Dear Students,

The

1st International Neurophilosophy Symposium

will be organise on 29 November 2024 at 10.30 on 29 November 2024 at Fuat Sezgin Conference Hall on the South Campus.

for detailed information about the programme.
